summary: Completed Phase 3 testing of MemoraAI. All 22 backend API tests pass (100%). All frontend pages verified - Dashboard shows category-specific 'Astrology Overview' widgets with correct labels (Consultations Today, Pending Readings, Total Customers, Revenue). No RealApex text found in visible areas of Login, Dashboard, Landing, Category Setup, Hot Sales, or WABA Setup pages.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing tenant with 3 categories (astrology, doctor_clinic, beauty_salon) and 18 services. Test customer phone: 9876543210 has existing memories.
context_for_next_testing_agent: MemoraAI Phase 3 testing complete. All new features verified: 1) Category-specific dashboard widgets showing 'Astrology Overview' with 4 widgets (Consultations Today, Pending Readings, Total Customers, Revenue), 2) Semantic memory search API working with keyword tokenization + Jaccard similarity, 3) RAG context API working for customer context building, 4) No RealApex text in visible areas of main pages. WhatsApp Meta API is not connected (no real WABA token) so actual message sending will fail, but AI processing pipeline works.

phase3_new_features.GET /api/memoraai/dashboard/category-sta: PASS - Returns category-specific widgets for astrology (Consultations Today, Pending Readings, Total Customers, Revenue)
phase3_new_features.POST /api/memoraai/memory/search: PASS - Semantic search with keyword tokenization working
phase3_new_features.Dashboard CategoryDashboardWidgets: PASS - Shows 'Astrology Overview' section with 4 widgets
phase3_new_features.RealApex cleanup: PASS - No RealApex text in visible areas of Login, Dashboard, Landing, Category Setup, Hot Sales, WABA Setup

frontend_pages.Dashboard: PASS - MemoraAI branding, Astrology Overview widgets visible, no RealApex
frontend_pages.Landing page: PASS - MemoraAI branding in navbar/footer, no RealApex in visible areas
frontend_pages.Category Setup: PASS - Working, MemoraAI branding, no RealApex
frontend_pages.Hot Sales: PASS - Working, MemoraAI branding, no RealApex
frontend_pages.WABA Setup: PASS - Working, MemoraAI branding, no RealApex

mocked_apis.WhatsApp Meta API: Not connected - no real WABA token configured. /api/whatsapp/simulate works for AI processing but actual message sending to WhatsApp will fail.
